text: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al-Akhbar : The UAE has hired a PR firm to improve its image in Africa after its role in the US‑Israeli war on Iran exposed it as a security hub for Washington and damaged its narrative of a “historic Gulf moment” in the continent. Emirati officials have defended their policies, including in Sudan, where they implicitly acknowledged backing the Rapid Support Forces. Analysts describe the UAE’s Africa strategy as sub‑imperial, focused on resource extraction and deepening chaos through alliances with non‑state actors. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 《新闻报》：阿联酋在美以对伊朗战争中的角色使其作为华盛顿安全枢纽的身份暴露，并损害了其在非洲大陆“历史性海湾时刻”的叙事，因此阿联酋聘请了一家公关公司来改善其在非洲的形象。阿联酋官员为其政策进行了辩护，包括在苏丹问题上，他们含蓄地承认了对快速支援部队的支持。分析人士将阿联酋的非洲战略描述为次帝国主义，专注于资源开采，并通过与非国家行为体结盟来加剧混乱。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇩🇪 A person threw paint at the former Crown Prince of Iran Reza Pahlavi during his visit to Berlin. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇮🇷 More footage emerging from the incident in Berlin shows an individual throwing red liquid/paint at Reza Pahlavi during his visit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇩🇪 一名男子在伊朗前王储礼萨·巴列维访问柏林期间向其投掷油漆。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇮🇷 柏林事件的更多画面显示，一名个人在礼萨·巴列维访问期间向其投掷了红色液体/油漆。 @wfwitness

text: Trump’s administration reclassified state-licensed medical marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III, meaning it’s now considered less dangerous under U.S. federal law. Source: AP
text_zh: 特朗普政府将州许可的医用大麻从一级管制药物重新分类为三级，这意味着根据美国联邦法律，它现在被认为危险性较低。来源：美联社

text: Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis: It’s China right now that is the export powerhouse, flooding the world with very, very cheap products, and that is threatening our industry.
text_zh: 希腊总理基里亚科斯·米佐塔基斯：目前中国是出口强国，正以非常、非常廉价的产品充斥全球，这正在威胁我们的工业。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "WATCH: An Iranian demonstrator threw paint on Reza Pahlavi in Berlin today." 📸 Reza Pahlavi.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“观看：一名伊朗示威者今天在柏林向礼萨·巴列维投掷油漆。” 📸 礼萨·巴列维。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺🇭🇺 Reuters: The EU has provisionally approved a €90 billion loan package for Ukraine after a months-long delay linked to disputes over oil flows. The breakthrough came as the Druzhba pipeline resumed operations, addressing Hungarian concerns that…" ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 EU Foreign Minister Kallas announced that the EU has come to an agreement on the €90 billion loan for Ukraine and the 20th sanctions package for Russia. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺🇭🇺 路透社：欧盟在经历了数月与石油运输纠纷相关的延误后，已初步批准向乌克兰提供900亿欧元的贷款方案。随着友谊输油管道恢复运营，解决了匈牙利的担忧，这一突破得以实现……” ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 欧盟外交部长卡拉斯宣布，欧盟已就向乌克兰提供900亿欧元贷款以及对俄罗斯的第20轮制裁方案达成一致。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇷 WSJ : The Trump administration is exploring resetting ties with Eritrea, including lifting some sanctions, to counter Iranian influence in the Red Sea. The reclusive state controls over 700 miles of Red Sea coastline, a vital maritime chokepoint threatened by Iran‑backed Houthis. Trump envoy Massad Boulos has met Eritrea’s president and Egyptian leader Sisi to advance the dialogue. Eritrea has been described as “Africa’s North Korea” for its repression, but officials argue the status quo of sanctions isn’t working. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇷 《华尔街日报》：特朗普政府正在探索重置与厄立特里亚的关系，包括解除部分制裁，以对抗伊朗在红海的影响力。这个与世隔绝的国家控制着超过700英里的红海海岸线，这是一个受到伊朗支持的胡塞武装威胁的重要海上咽喉要道。特朗普特使马萨德·布洛斯已会见厄立特里亚总统和埃及领导人塞西以推进对话。厄立特里亚因其压迫性统治被称为“非洲的朝鲜”，但官员们认为目前的制裁现状并不奏效。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Eric Trump said his company has secured a $24 million Pentagon contract for robots, describing the technology as a game‑changer for industry, military applications and hospitality. “We have to win robotics in the United States of America. We had to win that digital revolution [with crypto]. We better be winning this race in the United States of America. We’re the greatest economy in the world and that’s exactly what Sanket’s doing.” “When you go up and you interact with these robots and they fist bump you, they high five you, they follow your commands. You bring in AI economy. It’s gonna change industry. It’s gonna change military application. It’s gonna change hospitality. The uses are unlimited and I think it’s a very beautiful thing, but we must win that race.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 埃里克·特朗普表示，他的公司已获得一份价值2400万美元的五角大楼机器人合同，称该技术将改变工业、军事应用和酒店业。“我们必须在美国赢得机器人技术竞赛。我们必须赢得那场数字革命 [加密货币]。我们最好在美国赢得这场竞赛。我们是世界上最伟大的经济体，这正是Sanket正在做的事情。” “当你走上前去与这些机器人互动时，它们会和你碰拳、击掌，并听从你的指令。你引入了人工智能经济。它将改变工业。它将改变军事应用。它将改变酒店业。用途是无限的，我认为这是一件非常美好的事情，但我们必须赢得这场竞赛。” @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: ✊ Indestructible : How Iran stood firm after the martyrdom of Imam Khamenei? ▫️ How the assassination of Imam Khamenei exposed a deeper reality: the Islamic Republic is built not around one man, but around a system sustained by institutions, faith, and the people. @MKhamenei_en
text_zh: 🔄 转发自阿亚图拉·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：✊ 不可摧毁：伊朗在哈梅内伊伊玛目殉难后是如何坚定立场？ ▫️ 哈梅内伊伊玛目的遇刺如何揭示了一个更深层的现实：伊斯兰共和国不是围绕一个人建立的，而是围绕一个由机构、信仰和人民支撑的体系建立的。 @MKhamenei_en

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇭 A T‑50TH training jet of the Royal Thai Air Force skidded off the runway while landing at Wing 1 Air Base in Nakhon Ratchasima. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇭 泰国皇家空军一架 T-50TH 教练机在呵叻府第 1 空军基地降落时滑出跑道。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Palestinian media reports that Israeli troops fatally shot a 16‑year‑old Palestinian, Youssef Sameh Shtayyeh, during a raid on the West Bank city of Nablus. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 巴勒斯坦媒体报道称，以色列军队在对西岸城市纳布卢斯进行突袭时，开枪打死了一名 16 岁的巴勒斯坦人 Youssef Sameh Shtayyeh。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇸🇮🇱 Hamas condemned Israeli strikes in Gaza, including a strike on a "civilian car" in the Maghazi refugee camp that killed three people, and an "overnight massacre" in the northern Strip that killed five, including three children. The group said the…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Haaretz: Israeli fire killed four Palestinians in two separate strikes in Gaza, medics said. An airstrike on a vehicle on Salah al‑Din road in al‑Bureij refugee camp killed three people, including two civil defence paramedics. Earlier, one person was killed and three wounded in Khan Yunis. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇸🇮🇱 哈马斯谴责以色列在加沙的袭击，包括对马加齐难民营一辆‘平民车辆’的袭击，造成三人死亡；以及在加沙地带北部发生的‘彻夜屠杀’，造成五人死亡，其中包括三名儿童。该组织表示……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 《国土报》：医务人员称，以色列在加沙发动的两次独立袭击造成四名巴勒斯坦人死亡。对布雷吉难民营萨拉赫丁路上一辆汽车的空袭造成三人死亡，其中包括两名民防医护人员。早些时候，汗尤尼斯有一人死亡，三人受伤。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Al Arabiya: A senior Pakistani official said there is cautious optimism regarding contacts with the United States and Iran, but Tehran has not yet delivered its response. “Contacts are ongoing,” he stated. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 阿拉伯电视台：一位巴基斯坦高级官员表示，对与美国和伊朗的接触持谨慎乐观态度，但德黑兰尚未给出回应。他表示：“接触正在进行中。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 Lebanese Army Commander Joseph Aoun received Deputy Chief of Staff of the French Army for Operations General Jean-Michel Meunier in Yarzé along with an accompanying delegation. Discussions focused on cooperation between the Lebanese and French armed forces, as well as internal developments in Lebanon and the broader regional situation and its impact on the country. During the meeting, Aoun extended condolences over the death of two members of the French contingent serving with UNIFIL. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 黎巴嫩军队司令约瑟夫·奥恩在亚尔泽会见了法国军队作战副参谋长让-米歇尔·穆尼耶将军及其随行代表团。讨论重点是黎巴嫩和法国武装部队之间的合作，以及黎巴嫩国内局势、更广泛的地区局势及其对该国的影响。会晤期间，奥恩对两名在联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）服役的法国特遣队成员的死亡表示哀悼。 @wfwitness

text: When gravity chooses your nose as its favorite landmark. DO NOT stare at it! 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 当重力选择你的鼻子作为它最喜欢的地标时。千万别盯着它看！🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 i24NEWS: The aircraft carrier USS George H.W. Bush is expected to arrive in the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility in a little less than 48 hours. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 i24NEWS：乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰预计将在不到 48 小时内抵达美国中央司令部责任区。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Haaretz : Israel’s Defence Ministry has signed a multi‑year contract worth $200 million with Elbit Systems for aerial munitions. The deal is part of a policy to expand domestic defence production and reduce reliance on foreign supply chains, following lessons from wartime weapons embargoes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 《国土报》：以色列国防部已与埃尔比特系统公司签署了一份价值 2 亿美元的多年期航空弹药合同。这是继战时武器禁运的教训后，以色列扩大国内国防生产并减少对外国供应链依赖政策的一部分。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Asharq Al-Awsat : French President Macron reaffirmed unlimited support for Lebanon, even after UNIFIL’s mandate ends this year. He said France does not need a seat at the negotiating table to stand by Lebanon, and warned Israel that continued "occupation" and strikes only weaken the prospects of disarming Hezbollah. Macron called Hezbollah’s entry into the war on 2 March a “major strategic mistake”. Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam, after meetings in Luxembourg and Paris, said direct negotiations are not a sign of weakness but a responsible effort to restore sovereignty. Rejecting accusations of treason, he added: “Believe me, we will not allow Hezbollah to intimidate us.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 《中东报》：法国总统马克龙重申，即使在今年联黎部队的任务期限结束后，法国仍将对黎巴嫩提供无限支持。他表示，法国不需要在谈判桌上占有一席之地来支持黎巴嫩，并警告以色列，持续的“占领”和袭击只会削弱解除真主党武装的前景。马克龙称真主党 3 月 2 日参战是一个“重大的战略错误”。黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆在卢森堡和巴黎会晤后表示，直接谈判不是软弱的表现，而是恢复主权的负责任努力。在驳斥叛国指控时，他补充说：“相信我，我们不会允许真主党恐吓我们。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel WATCH 🔴 Hezbollah proudly releases footage showing rocket launches during the ceasefire. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047288484218474764/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报观察 🔴 真主党自豪地发布了停火期间火箭弹发射的画面。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047288484218474764/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) More than a handful of 🇺🇸 #USAF Boeing KC-46A Pegasus aerial tankers bringing additional fighter jets to the Europe/Middle East theater. All possessing ADOBE## callsigns, which are usually associated with CORONET missions. CORONET mission - deployment of U.S. Air Force fighter jets over long distances by utilizing tanker aircraft for in-flight refueling. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）超过几架 🇺🇸 #美国空军 波音 KC-46A 飞马座空中加油机正在将额外的战斗机运送到欧洲/中东战区。所有飞机都拥有 ADOBE## 呼号，这通常与 CORONET 任务相关。CORONET 任务 - 通过利用加油机进行空中加油，将美国空军战斗机进行远程部署。推文

text: Open Source Intel An Israeli airstrike on a vehicle north of al-Maghazi camp in central Gaza killed three and injured several others. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047287545541660858/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列对加沙中部马加齐难民营以北的一辆汽车进行空袭，造成三人死亡，多人受伤。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047287545541660858/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel UK government says medical records linked to 500,000 people from the UK Biobank health database were offered for sale on Chinese platform Alibaba, according to Sky. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 据天空新闻台报道，英国政府称，与英国生物银行健康数据库中 50 万人相关的医疗记录在中国平台阿里巴巴上被挂牌出售。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @alex98almeida : @Felix_Nuno isto se fossem os estados unidos chama-se-ia manufacturing consent tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @alex98almeida : @Felix_Nuno 如果这是美国，这就叫制造共识 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Department of War: "Overnight, U.S. forces carried out a maritime interdiction and right-of-visit boarding of the sanctioned stateless vessel M/T Majestic X transporting oil from Iran, in the Indian Ocean within the INDOPACOM area of responsibility. We will continue global maritime enforcement to disrupt illicit networks and interdict vessels providing material support to Iran, wherever they operate. International waters cannot be used as a shield by sanctioned actors. The Department of War will continue to deny illicit actors and their vessels freedom of maneuver in the maritime domain." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国战争部：“一夜之间，美国军队在印度-太平洋司令部责任区内的印度洋上，对一艘受制裁的无国籍船只 M/T Majestic X 号进行了海上拦截和登船检查，该船正在从伊朗运输石油。我们将继续进行全球海上执法，以破坏非法网络，并拦截为伊朗提供物质支持的船只，无论它们在哪里活动。公海不能被受制裁的行为者用作盾牌。战争部将继续剥夺非法行为者及其船只在海上领域的机动自由。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Albanian PM Edi Rama on Albania Energy: I can talk without the permission of Greeks, I can talk without the permission of Europeans, I can’t talk without the permission of Americans, because they can be very nasty. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047286226810556902/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 阿尔巴尼亚总理埃迪·拉马谈阿尔巴尼亚能源：我可以在没有希腊人许可的情况下说话，我可以在没有欧洲人许可的情况下说话，但我不能在没有美国人许可的情况下说话，因为他们可能会非常刻薄。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047286226810556902/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @vonderleyen : We are on our way to Cyprus with good news. I welcome the agreement from the Member States on the 90 billion euro loan to Ukraine for 2026-27 and on 20th sanctions package. While Russia doubles down on its aggression, we are doubling down on our support to the brave Ukrainian nation enabling Ukraine to defend itself and putting pressure on Russia’s war economy. Now we will move to swiftly implement on both fronts. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @vonderleyen : 我们正在前往塞浦路斯的路上，并带来了好消息。我欢迎成员国就 2026-27 年向乌克兰提供 900 亿欧元贷款以及第 20 轮制裁方案达成的协议。在俄罗斯加倍进行侵略的同时，我们也在加倍支持勇敢的乌克兰民族，使乌克兰能够保卫自己，并对俄罗斯的战争经济施加压力。现在我们将迅速在两条战线上实施。推文

text: WarTranslated The Russian Ministry of Foreign Affairs claims that Russia has been invited to participate at the highest level in the G20 summit in Miami this December. This was stated by Deputy Foreign Minister Alexander Pankin. "There is an invitation to attend at the highest level, but we will see closer to the date; God knows what will happen by then." - he told reporters at the UN headquarters. The G20 Leaders' Summit will be held in Miami on December 14–15, 2026. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯外交部声称，俄罗斯已受邀参加今年 12 月在迈阿密举行的 G20 峰会，并由最高级别代表出席。这是副外长亚历山大·潘金所说的。“有最高级别出席的邀请，但我们会看临近日期的情况；天知道到那时会发生什么。”他在联合国总部对记者说。G20 领导人峰会将于 2026 年 12 月 14 日至 15 日在迈阿密举行。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @eucopresident : Promised, delivered, implemented. The EU’s strategy to achieve a just and lasting peace in Ukraine rests on two pillars: strengthening Ukraine; increasing pressure on Russia. Today we moved forward on both: ▪️ Unlocking the €90 billion loan to Ukraine, securing financial and military support for 2026–2027. ▪️ Adopting the 20th package of sanctions against Russia, reducing its ability to wage war. Europe stands firm, united and unwavering in its support to Ukraine. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @eucopresident : 承诺，交付，实施。欧盟在乌克兰实现公正和持久和平的战略基于两大支柱：加强乌克兰；增加对俄罗斯的压力。今天我们在两方面都取得了进展：▪️ 解锁向乌克兰提供的 900 亿欧元贷款，确保 2026-2027 年的财政和军事支持。▪️ 通过对俄罗斯的第 20 轮制裁方案，削弱其发动战争的能力。欧洲在支持乌克兰方面立场坚定、团结一致且毫不动摇。推文

text: Open Source Intel This is the current environment in the UK. This attack happened 72 hours ago and according to preliminary info, the UK police have still not found this man. If this were a man posting an insult on the internet, police would be at his door in 4 hours. It’s becoming increasingly clear that the UK is no longer safe for Jews. VERY DISTURBING 🔴 UK: Elliman Avenue in Slough, UK a pro Palestinian man violently assault’s a visibly Jewish man who was minding his business and working. The attacker confronted the man, repeatedly demanding, “What are you doing around here?” The man replies, “am I bothering you?” He then screamed, “You dirty motherf***ing Jew,” “you f-ing baby killer,” and launched a physical assault on the Jewish man. INTERNET, FIND THIS MAN. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 这是英国目前的状况。这次袭击发生在 72 小时前，根据初步信息，英国警方仍未找到此人。如果这是一个在互联网上发布侮辱言论的人，警察会在 4 小时内出现在他家门口。越来越明显的是，英国对犹太人来说已不再安全。非常令人不安 🔴 英国：在英国斯劳的埃利曼大道，一名亲巴勒斯坦男子暴力袭击了一名正在工作且安分守己的犹太人。袭击者与该男子对峙，反复质问：“你在这里做什么？”该男子回答：“我打扰你了吗？”随后他尖叫道：“你这个肮脏的犹太杂种”、“你这个该死的杀婴者”，并对这名犹太男子发动了身体攻击。互联网，找到这个人。 - 开源情报 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @APHClarkson : @Felix_Nuno Sure, but at some point the IRGC will need wider cash flow to keep its own support base happy and those opposed to it quiet on a more sustainable basis. There is a potential landing zone for a more stable deal with the US, but that requires skilled diplomacy... tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @APHClarkson : @Felix_Nuno 当然，但在某个时候，伊斯兰革命卫队将需要更广泛的现金流来维持其支持基础的满意度，并以更可持续的方式让反对者保持安静。与美国达成更稳定协议的潜在着陆区是存在的，但这需要高超的外交技巧…… 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 An Israeli airstrike targeted a vehicle car on Salah al‑Din street in central Gaza killed at least three people, including civil defence members Hazem Rami al‑Aidi, according to Palestinian reports. The Gaza health ministry reports that over the past…" ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Hamas condemned Israeli strikes in Gaza, including a strike on a "civilian car" in the Maghazi refugee camp that killed three people, and an "overnight massacre" in the northern Strip that killed five, including three children. The group said the international community’s silence encourages war crimes and called for immediate action to stop the daily killings. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 据巴勒斯坦报道，以色列对加沙中部萨拉赫丁街的一辆汽车进行了空袭，造成至少三人死亡，其中包括民防成员 Hazem Rami al-Aidi。加沙卫生部报告称，在过去……” ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 哈马斯谴责以色列在加沙的袭击，包括对马加齐难民营一辆“平民车辆”的袭击，造成三人死亡；以及在加沙地带北部发生的“彻夜屠杀”，造成五人死亡，其中包括三名儿童。该组织表示，国际社会的沉默助长了战争罪行，并呼吁采取立即行动停止每日的杀戮。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli Foreign Minister Saar has appointed George Deek as Special Envoy to the Christian World, in a move aimed at strengthening ties with Christian communities globally. “The State of Israel attaches great importance to its relations with the Christian world and with its Christian friends around the world. I am confident that George, a respected and experienced diplomat, will greatly contribute to the friendship and strengthening of the ties between the State of Israel and the Christian world.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列外交部长萨尔已任命乔治·迪克为基督教世界特使，此举旨在加强与全球基督教社区的联系。“以色列国非常重视与基督教世界及其世界各地基督教朋友的关系。我相信，作为一名受人尊敬且经验丰富的外交官，乔治将为以色列国与基督教世界之间的友谊和联系的加强做出巨大贡献。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 US claims its forces seized a sanctioned oil tanker carrying Iranian oil in the Indian Ocean yesterday. The vessel is identified as the Majestic X . Footage: Tasnim 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国声称其部队昨天在印度洋扣押了一艘载有伊朗石油的受制裁油轮。该船被确认为“Majestic X”号。视频来源：塔斯尼姆通讯社 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇾🇪 Asharq Al-Awsat: Saudi Arabia has funded 11 military brigades in Yemen’s Shabwa province, paid their salaries and supplies, and added four new brigades to the existing seven, the deputy governor of Shabwa said. Shabwa faces Houthi forces on six fronts. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇾🇪 《中东报》：沙巴瓦省副省长表示，沙特阿拉伯已资助了也门沙巴瓦省的11个军事旅，支付了他们的工资和补给，并在原有的7个旅基础上增加了4个新旅。沙巴瓦省在六条战线上直面胡塞武装。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 Asharq Al‑Awsat : Deir al‑Balah in central Gaza will hold the first local elections in the Strip in nearly two decades on Saturday, concurrently with the West Bank. The city was chosen as the least damaged by the war. Around 70,449 registered voters will cast ballots at 12 polling centres (nine tents, three in civil society buildings). Only original residents, not displaced persons, are eligible to vote. Four lists are competing, each with 15 candidates including at least four women. Candidates were required to sign a pledge to abide by the PLO programme, which includes recognition of Israel – a potential issue for Hamas. The Hamas‑run civil police will provide security but will stay away from polling centres and remain unarmed. Results are expected on Sunday morning. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 《中东报》：加沙地带中部的代尔拜拉赫将于周六举行近二十年来加沙地带的首次地方选举，与西岸同步进行。该市被选为受战争破坏最小的城市。约70,449名登记选民将在12个投票中心（9个帐篷，3个在民间社会建筑内）投票。只有原住民有资格投票，流离失所者除外。共有四个名单参与竞争，每个名单有15名候选人，其中包括至少4名女性。候选人必须签署承诺书，遵守巴解组织的纲领，其中包括承认以色列——这对哈马斯来说是一个潜在的问题。由哈马斯管理的民警将提供安全保障，但将远离投票中心且不携带武器。预计周日上午公布结果。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Washington Post : Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam stated, in a interview with WaPo, any agreement with Israel must include a “full withdrawal” of Israeli forces, rejecting a buffer zone where displaced Lebanese cannot return. He called for extending the fragile ceasefire, following President Trump’s extension of the US‑Iran truce, and expressed hope that Washington will use its “leverage over Israel” in the negotiations. Salam said Lebanon wants to disarm Hezbollah but that it is a process requiring a strengthened Lebanese army, not something that happens overnight. He described the talks as “really at the very beginning,” but said Lebanon will not leave any stone unturned to reach its objectives. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 《华盛顿邮报》：黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆在接受《华盛顿邮报》采访时表示，与以色列达成的任何协议都必须包括以色列军队的“全面撤出”，拒绝设立流离失所的黎巴嫩人无法返回的缓冲区。他呼吁在特朗普总统延长美伊停火协议后，延长脆弱的停火协议，并表示希望华盛顿能在谈判中利用其对以色列的“影响力”。萨拉姆表示，黎巴嫩希望解除真主党的武装，但这需要加强黎巴嫩军队，不是一朝一夕能完成的。他形容谈判“确实处于非常初期的阶段”，但表示黎巴嫩将竭尽全力实现其目标。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ ⬛ 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 Asharq Al-Awsat: ISIS has shifted its priorities in Syria, moving from territorial control to guerrilla warfare aimed at raising the “cost of governance” for the new government in Damascus. Following the U.S. withdrawal from bases in eastern Syria and the government’s takeover of areas east of the Euphrates, ISIS has intensified attacks on security checkpoints with IEDs and direct assaults, carrying out about 22 attacks in March alone. ISIS propaganda has focused on discrediting President Ahmed al‑Shara, accusing him of “apostasy” and seeking to exploit tribal grievances in Deir ez‑Zor and poor living conditions to recruit disillusioned youth, including from camps. While the group has lost its ability to seize territory, it retains the capacity to conduct low‑level harassment attacks, testing the government’s ability to maintain stability. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ⬛ 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 《中东报》：ISIS在叙利亚的优先事项已发生转变，从领土控制转向旨在提高大马士革新政府“治理成本”的游击战。随着美国从叙利亚东部的基地撤出以及政府接管幼发拉底河以东地区，ISIS加强了对安全检查站的袭击，使用简易爆炸装置和直接攻击，仅三月份就发动了约22次袭击。ISIS的宣传重点是诋毁艾哈迈德·沙拉总统，指责他“叛教”，并试图利用代尔祖尔的部落不满情绪和恶劣的生活条件来招募幻灭的年轻人，包括来自营地的年轻人。虽然该组织已失去夺取领土的能力，但仍保留进行低水平骚扰袭击的能力，以测试政府维持稳定的能力。 @wfwitness

text_zh: 🇪🇺 在对待以色列和俄罗斯的问题上，卡卡·哈拉斯（Kaka Khallas）采取双重标准。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The EU has formally approved a €90 billion loan for Ukraine and a 20th sanctions package against Russia. The measures were finalized after Hungary lifted its veto.
text_zh: 欧盟已正式批准向乌克兰提供900亿欧元贷款，并批准了针对俄罗斯的第20轮制裁方案。这些措施是在匈牙利取消否决权后最终确定的。

text: Albanian PM Edi Rama: We are member of NATO, but still, you know, it’s not that we decide much there. When NATO does something good, like for example liberating Kosovo, we say we did a great thing. When NATO does something bad, like leaving Afghanistan like they did, we say it’s their fault.
text_zh: 阿尔巴尼亚总理埃迪·拉马：我们是北约成员国，但你知道，我们在那里并没有太大的决定权。当北约做了好事，比如解放科索沃，我们就说我们做了一件伟大的事。当北约做了坏事，比如像他们那样离开阿富汗，我们就说那是他们的错。
